title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 382.140 - Consolidated registration statements or amendments, when
text:
382.140.  Consolidated registration statements or amendments, when. — The director may require or allow two or more affiliated insurers subject to registration under the provisions of sections 382.010 to 382.300 to file a consolidated registration statement or consolidated reports amending their consolidated registration statement or their individual registration statements.
(L. 1971 S.B. 101 § 17)
